title: coleus celsus
intro: Coleus celsus, also known as Coleus aromaticus or Coleus barbatus, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Asia and Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Coleus celsus include its ability to aid digestion, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Coleus celsus can be made into teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
